completed_in_this_pass: Confirmed from user evidence that OpsCinema Suite.app was already enabled in macOS Privacy & Security and moved the investigation into app-side behavior.
Stabilized the packaged local-smoke app identity by signing the installed app with the designated requirement identifier "com.opscinema.desktop".
Changed the permissions screen path so it reads Screen Recording status without triggering a real capture probe on launch.
Replaced the failing helper and CLI keyframe capture path with an in-process macOS capture path that produces PNG bytes inside the app process.
Adjusted OCR provider bbox parsing so slight edge overflow no longer fails the full packaged OCR stage.
Rebuilt, reinstalled, reopened, and smoke-ran the packaged app until Start Handoff Session completed through export creation.
remaining_open_items: Confirm and fix why a late Screen Recording prompt can still reappear after the successful packaged export flow.
Prove Apply Step Edit (Retry) end to end on a successful packaged session.
Prove relaunch persistence for the completed packaged session and export state instead of only seeing the default permissions route on reopen.
verification: make smoke-app-verify passed after the install-path signing fix.
cargo check -p opscinema_desktop_backend --features runtime passed after the capture-path change.
A real packaged Start Handoff Session succeeded through capture, OCR, tutorial generation, and export creation.
The latest packaged export was written to /tmp/opscinema-ui-export with manifest.json, tutorial.json, and player/index.html.
blockers: Post-export packaged smoke behavior is not fully stable or persistent yet: the main flow now exports successfully, but a late Screen Recording prompt can still reappear and the pass does not yet contain clean proof for Apply Step Edit (Retry) plus relaunch persistence.

execution_order: Confirm and fix the late post-export Screen Recording prompt behavior.
Prove Apply Step Edit (Retry) on a successful packaged session.
Prove relaunch persistence for the completed packaged export session.
blockers: Post-export packaged smoke behavior is not fully stable or persistent yet: the main flow now exports successfully, but a late Screen Recording prompt can still reappear and the pass does not yet contain clean proof for Apply Step Edit (Retry) plus relaunch persistence.
done_definition: OPscinema is fully cleared when the packaged app completes and proves Start Handoff Session, Apply Step Edit (Retry), export creation, and relaunch persistence in one consistent state.
docs/followup-opscinema-implementation.md and docs/followup-opscinema-implementation-summary.json describe the same verified result from this implementation pass.
